title: Migrate DTP_APP_V3 to Root Laravel + Inertia + React Structure
description:
Restructure the repository so the root is the main Laravel project (eliminating separate `dtp/` and `spa/` folders) with the frontend built using Laravel Inertia + React in the official starter-kit-style structure.

### Target Structure
- **Repo root** = single Laravel application
- **Frontend** under `resources/js/`:
  - `components/` — Reusable React components
  - `hooks/` — React hooks
  - `layouts/` — App and auth layouts
  - `lib/` — Utilities and config
  - `pages/` — Inertia page components
  - `types/` — TypeScript definitions
- Single `composer.json`, `package.json`, and Vite config at root
- Single deployable codebase

### Scope
1. Move Laravel app from `dtp/` to repo root
2. Add Inertia + React (Inertia Laravel adapter + @inertiajs/react)
3. Migrate existing React UI from `spa/` into `resources/js/`
4. Auth: keep session-based auth; OAuth callbacks redirect to Inertia routes
5. Remove or consolidate Cloudways-specific workflows/docs
6. Update documentation for new structure and deployment
acceptance_criteria: Root is the only Laravel app — no dtp/ or spa/ as separate app roots
Inertia + React runs from resources/js/ with the defined structure
Login and main flows work via Inertia pages and Laravel routes
Single php artisan serve and npm run dev from root
Docs updated for new structure and deployment changes
ux_changes: Entire frontend migrated from standalone SPA to Inertia + React pages rendered via Laravel routes.
middleware_changes: Laravel configured with Inertia adapter. SPA routing replaced with server-side Inertia page rendering. Session-based auth preserved with OAuth callback redirects to Inertia routes.
api_changes: API routing consolidated — SPA API calls replaced with Inertia page props and Laravel controller responses.
implementation_notes: Major architectural restructuring. The goal is a single deployable codebase with no separate app roots. Follows the official Laravel React starter kit layout patterns.
